title: Support boolean and/or in sequence expressions

features.name: boolean and in SVA sequence expression
features.description: Code should include an SVA sequence expression using boolean 'and' operator within an assert property context
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) (a and b) |-> c);

features.name: boolean or in SVA sequence expression
features.description: Code should include an SVA sequence expression using boolean 'or' operator within an assert property context
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) (a or b) |-> c);

features.name: SVA assert property with clocking
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property statement with clocking event for sequence evaluation
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) (a and b) |-> c);

features.name: consecutive boolean operators in SVA sequence
features.description: Code should include multiple boolean operators in sequence expression with implication operator
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) ((a and b) or c) |-> d);
